title: hibbertia rhynchocalyx
intro: Hibbertia rhynchocalyx, a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae, is also known as the Spurred Hibbertia. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hibbertia rhynchocalyx are said to include relief from fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as improved digestion and immune function. Hibbertia rhynchocalyx can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
